About Swan Signature

A Notary You Can Count On
When It Matters Most

Swan Signature Notary Services was founded to fill a real gap — someone your neighbors can actually trust in their most stressful moments. Closing on a home, navigating an estate document, or signing papers from a hospital bed: we show up for all of it.

Rooted in Lakeland for 21 years. Married, two kids, proud band mom and scout leader. This is a full-time commitment — not a side hustle.

[ Photo Placeholder ]
What We Do

Professional Notary
Services

From everyday notarizations to complex real estate closings and international apostilles — handled with accuracy, care, and full professionalism.

01
General Notary Work
Documents, affidavits, powers of attorney, healthcare surrogates — signed, sealed, wherever you are.
Learn more →
02
Real Estate & Loan Signing
Certified LSA partnering with title companies, signing services, and attorneys for seamless closings.
Learn more →
03
Apostille Services
State and federal apostille facilitation for international document use — completed accurately and efficiently.
Learn more →
04
Remote Online Notary
Approved Florida RON — notarize securely from anywhere in the world via compliant online platform.
Learn more →

Serving West

We meet our clients where they are — homes, hospitals, offices, and beyond. Travel outside primary region available. Remote Online Notary available worldwide.

Now Available
Remote Online Notary

As an approved Florida RON, Swan Signature can notarize your documents via secure online platform — no matter where you are in the world. All you need is an internet connection.
